current_assets.description: Loop-leaf mark or friendly Cedar Loop Market wordmark
Warm neighborhood market stalls with produce, flowers, bread, ceramics, or local makers
Simple loop path line that suggests short walks through the market

non_primary_assets.description: Small produce, flower, bread, or ceramic icons
non_primary_assets.limits: Do not replace the market-stall hero or logo.

selection_note: Use current_assets for active design choices unless deprecated_assets.json marks an item or direction as ineligible.
